english:
Advances the current character to level 80. Grants a starting set of exotic gear and a box of items to get you started. 

<c=@flavor>Use for details. You will be able to confirm/cancel.</c>
Aether from a strong Branded enemy. It must be purified to be usable.
Aether from a strong destroyer enemy. It must be purified to be usable.
Aether from a strong Icebrood enemy. It must be purified to be usable.
Aether from a strong Mordrem enemy. It must be purified to be usable.
Aether from a strong Risen enemy. It must be purified to be usable.
Aether from a strong Void enemy. It must be purified to be usable.
After completing episode 5 of season 1, speak with the Mist Stranger in the last story mission, Meeting the Zephyrites.

After defeating Captain Ashym, take a Gift of Wood to the Ascalonian woodcutter, located inside the Urban Battleground fractal.
This item only has value as part of a collection.
After dodge rolling in combat or evading an attack, your next attack is guaranteed to be a critical hit. <c=@reminder>(Cooldown: 1 Second)</c>
After dodge rolling in combat, the next incoming strike will always be a glancing blow.
After evading an enemy's attack, place the Eye of Isgarren on them for a duration. You deal increased strike and condition duration against enemies with the Eye of Isgarren.
After finding a collection of his works, revisit Snargle Goldclaw in the Eye of the North.
After shadowstepping or using a deception skill, fire a blade at a nearby enemy after a short delay, applying torment and increasing your strike damage against that target.
After using a healing or elixir skill, your next few attacks inflict poison. <c=@reminder>Healing skills can only trigger this effect once every interval.</c>
After using a healing skill, temporarily deal damage to nearby enemies when struck.
After using a movement skill, your next attack creates an arc of chain lightning that strikes nearby enemies.
After using an elite skill, call down an artillery strike that inflicts stun on the skill target or nearest enemy.
After using an elite skill, create an area that protects allies and destroys enemy projectiles.
After using an elite skill, create an area underneath yourself. Standing in this area increases your outgoing strike damage.
After using an elite skill, emit a wave of corruption that inflicts damaging conditions.
After using an elite skill, fire a projectile at the target or nearest enemy that damages and inflicts conditions. Damage scales with the recharge of the elite skill.
After using an elite skill, launch bubbles at nearby enemies. Enemies struck by the bubbles become trapped and float for a short period of time.
After using an elite skill, launch icicles that inflict chilled at nearby enemies.
After using an elite skill, release a wave of pheromones that causes bees to swarm enemies struck.
After using an elite skill, send forth a nightmare pulse that inflicts fear and poison on nearby enemies.
After using an elite skill, shield yourself with a projectile-reflecting barrier while summoning a wave that pulls enemies toward you.
Air currents swirl gently around this statuette.
Albin Chronicler is very interested in these.
All the components needed to create a foam out of any liquid.
All the components needed to seal and cook meat in a temperature-controlled water bath.
All the components needed to turn food products into gelatinous spheres.

All those named here have probably died of old age.

This item only has value as part of a collection.
Allied players gain double effectiveness of the keep's objective aura while within the perimeter of the keep.
Allows collection and use of ancient asuran power sources to reveal Zinn's stashes. The Technomagical Detector can be used to overload the locking mechanisms on the stash with 25 Unbound Magic.
Allows the collection of Destroyer's Heat.
Allows the collection of Elemental Flames.
Allows the collection of Fire Imbued Heart.
Allows the collection of Flame Effigy Embers.
Allows the collection of Wyvern Liquid Fire.
Aloeth, Revel in Ruin of Severance
Already loaded with base medicinal magic compounds. Needs specific infectious samples added for final medical transmutation.
Also gives you a sugar rush.
Although they are normally poisonous, Elain can process these for consumption.
Ambient music to play in your guild hall.
An amalgamation of rift essences used for crafting that have been purified by magic...and more than a little luck.

An amalgamation of rift essences used for crafting.
The recipe can be purchased from Lyhr in the Wizard's Tower.
An amber runestone. It glows in your hands.
An ancient mursaat relic that can be used to harvest Unbound Magic.
An ancient tome written by Vass. It was stored in a tower in Orr before it sank beneath the waves.

An assortment of supplies the Speakers are using to craft their "one-hundred-percent organic" incendiary devices.

(This bundle is only usable in The Gang War of Echovald events.)
An award given to particularly bright students of Rata Novus. Collect 10 to rummage through Zinn's research supplies.
An axe roughly forged from Brand crystal using techniques learned from Forge Master Hilina.
An axe skillfully forged from Brand crystal using techniques learned from Forge Master Hilina.

An eel statue used to create Kraitkin.

Purchase the recipe for this item from any Mystic Forge vendor and reach a tailor rating of 400 to craft.
An elaborate key. Click to see a hint toward a sunken treasure.
An empowered focus thrumming with a boneskinner's power.
An empowered scepter thrumming with a boneskinner's power.
An empowered staff thrumming with a boneskinner's power.
An empty keg made by cooks for storing liquids.
An energy core from a golem that can be used to overload the Inquest generator.
An enhanced version of the standard Duty-Bound armor.
An enhanced version of the standard Homespun armor.
An enhanced version of the standard Mighty weapon.
An enhanced version of the standard Ragamuffin armor.
An exceedingly rare item acquired by completing all of the Guild Wars 2: Visions of Eternity meta-events and world boss events. Double-click to select an account-bound Chromatic Bubbles infusion.

An exceedingly rare item acquired by completing survey events in Mistburned Barrens and completing challenge mode bosses in Mount Balrior. 
Double-click to select an account-bound bloodstone infusion.

<c=@flavor>Not fit for consumption.</c>
An exceedingly rare item acquired by completing Temple of Febe raid encounter challenge mode. Double-click to select an account-bound possession infusion.
An exceedingly rare item acquired by completing the Cosmic Observatory raid encounter challenge mode. Double-click to select an account-bound jotun infusion.
An exceedingly rare item acquired by completing the meta-event finale in Eternity's Garden and from the Chamber of Regret minidungeon . Double-click to select an account-bound Seer Transcendence.
An exceedingly rare item acquired by defeating a powerful foe. Double-click to select an account-bound Echo of the Dragonvoid infusion.
An exceedingly rare item acquired by defeating an ancient darkness under challenging conditions. Double-click to select an account-bound Mote of Darkness.
An exceedingly rare item acquired by defeating keep lords in the Mists. Double-click to select an account-bound Mistwalker Infusion.
An exceedingly rare item acquired by defeating powerful foes under challenging conditions. Double-click to select an account-bound Clockwork Infusion.
An exceedingly rare item acquired by defeating powerful foes under challenging conditions. Double-click to select an account-bound Imperial Everbloom.
An exceedingly rare item acquired by fishing in Castora and by converting illusive jellycrabs. Double-click to select an account-bound ethereal sea-life infusion.
An exceedingly rare item acquired from festive events. Double-click to select an account-bound Silent Symphony.
An exceedingly rare item scavenged by merchant golems after the battle against an ancient darkness. Double-click to select an account-bound Mote of Darkness.
An exceedingly rare item scavenged by merchant golems after the fight against Jormag. Double-click to select an account-bound Frost Legion infusion.

An exquisitely cut sapphire of tremendous size.

This item only has value as part of a collection.
An extremely fancy coin from the Furniture Proprietor in Super Adventure Box. Trade these for decorations in your guild hall.
An Illuminated Boreal weapon, crafted using materials found in Bjora Marches.
An impossibly thin ticket of shiny golden material that signifies access to the highest echelons of society.

An inert pile of dust from a ley line. A jolt of energy from a specialized asuran lab will energize it.
Double-click to show.
An inscription on this memorial says, "For Zor, who calmed all arguments."
An inscription on this memorial says, "For Zor, who fought for Elona."
An inscription on this memorial says, "For Zor, who listened to everyone's troubles."
An inscription on this memorial says, "For Zor, who looked after his older sister."
An inscription on this memorial says, "For Zor, who tended garden and field."
An inscription on this memorial says, "For Zor, who walked down the canyons, singing."

An item from the Powderkegs crew used by the Corsair, Mehdi, to craft his famous tainted grog in the Domain of Istan.
An item from the Sly crew used by the Corsair, Mehdi, to craft his famous tainted grog in the Domain of Istan.
An item from the Stonefist crew used by the Corsair, Mehdi, to craft his famous tainted grog in the Domain of Istan.

An odd blue wurm husk

An odd-looking item that Timin Blastburl seems to be interested in.
An offering used in dungeon recipes.
An old note that appears to be written by the late Captain Weyandt. This item only has value as part of a collection.
An old sapphire amulet, weathered by frequent use. It went missing when the Wizard's Tower left the Kessex Hills.
An ornate scroll certifying your patronage of the Circus Spectacular circus troupe.
An out-of-place bit of cloth and leather carrying the scent of tar.
An unassuming scroll covered in thin green lines that seem to glow slightly when touched. Use to teleport to the Wizard's Tower.
An uncharged fragment of Aurene attuned to crystal and fury. Can be charged by defeating a powerful foe while wielding an Aurene-based legendary weapon.
An uncharged fragment of Aurene attuned to fire and destruction. Can be charged by defeating a powerful foe while wielding an Aurene-based legendary weapon.
An uncharged fragment of Aurene attuned to ice and persuasion. Can be charged by defeating a powerful foe while wielding an Aurene-based legendary weapon.
An uncharged fragment of Aurene attuned to plant and mind. Can be charged by defeating a powerful foe while wielding an Aurene-based legendary weapon.
An uncharged fragment of Aurene attuned to shadow and death. Can be charged by defeating a powerful foe while wielding an Aurene-based legendary weapon.
An uncharged fragment of Aurene attuned to water and life. Can be charged by defeating a powerful foe while wielding an Aurene-based legendary weapon.
An unrecognizable figure. If this had been made of jade, it would still be in good shape.
